siteTagline: Reliable software and digital growth for modern businesses.
heroTitle: Build smarter digital experiences with SANA Softs
heroSubtitle: We design reliable mobile apps, websites, and growth-focused digital products for founders and fast-moving teams.
aboutBody: SANA Softs helps businesses launch polished products, improve operations, and build a stronger online presence through reliable software solutions.
footerNote: Made with care for founders, teams, and growing brands.

blogPosts.title: The Future of Mobile App Development in 2026
blogPosts.excerpt: Explore how AI, better automation, and stronger privacy tools are changing the way modern apps are built.
blogPosts.content: Modern app teams are shipping faster by combining AI-based automation with polished UX design. The most successful products in 2026 are not just feature-rich; they are reliable, accessible, and deeply focused on the user journey.

blogPosts.title: Getting Started with React and Tailwind CSS
blogPosts.excerpt: A practical guide for building elegant and responsive sites with React and Tailwind.
blogPosts.content: React and Tailwind CSS pair beautifully for fast development and flexible design. Start by defining a strong component structure, then layer your styles with small utility classes to keep the experience consistent across devices.

blogPosts.title: Why Cloud Deployment Matters for Your Business
blogPosts.excerpt: A reliable cloud strategy can improve uptime, reduce costs, and make growth smoother.
blogPosts.content: Cloud deployment removes much of the friction that slows growth. Teams can scale faster, protect business continuity, and update products with confidence when their hosting and deployment workflow is well planned.

seo.defaultDescription: SANA Softs delivers modern software, mobile apps, web services, and digital growth support for ambitious brands.
